text.title: Jira Workflow Management Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the Jira Workflow Management methodology end-to-end.

step.name: agree-issue-types
step.action: Agree the issue-type set (Story / Bug / Task / Epic + optional sub-task).

step.name: design-workflow
step.action: Design workflow per issue-type: statuses + transitions; map to status categories.

step.name: write-transition-rules
step.action: Add validators / conditions / post-functions on the workflow itself; do NOT mirror in automation.

step.name: namespace-automation
step.action: Add automation rules with namespace + version; deprecate ad-hoc rules.

step.name: publish-shared-filters
step.action: Save JQL queries as shared filters with stable IDs; reference filters from dashboards.
